frame_counting.description: Cross-site leak via frame counting -- detect number of frames in cross-origin page to infer state (logged in vs not, search results count)

probes.description: Frame count comparison -- open target in iframe/window.open, compare window.length for authenticated vs unauthenticated state. Different frame count reveals auth status or search results.

timing_leak.description: Cross-site timing leak -- measure response time differences to infer cross-origin state

probes.description: Performance API timing -- use performance.now() or Resource Timing API to measure cross-origin request duration. Longer response = more results = valid search term/user exists.

error_event.description: Cross-site leak via error events -- detect if cross-origin resource loads successfully or errors to infer state

probes.description: onload/onerror event detection -- embed cross-origin resource as ,
